news.headline: EV startup Nikola, formerly exciting investors, declares bankruptcy after failing to translate plans for electric and hydrogen trucks into profitability.
news.summary: The company, formerly a top performer with a soaring stock price, encountered difficulties in transforming its initiatives for electric and hydrogen trucks into a profitable venture.

news.headline: Investors cautiously eye Russia's potential, as Western firms weigh returning amid peace talks post many leaving 3 years ago.
news.summary: Investors are showing interest in potential peace talks, despite the challenges faced by Western businesses that had withdrawn from the country just three years ago.

news.headline: Atos aids Invictus Games 2025, held in Vancouver and Whistler, achieving new milestones.
Anomalix adds cybersecurity veteran Fred Bement to Advisory Board, bringing 40 years of experience in enterprise sales.
news.summary: Anomalix, a reputable company specializing in Identity and Access Management solutions, recently revealed that Fred Bement, a seasoned professional with more than 40 years of expertise in enterprise sales and cybersecurity, has become a new addition to its Advisory Board. This strategic move is expected to bring valuable insights and guidance to the company’s operations.

news.headline: DiscoverE announces 2025 Future City winners who engineered floating cities tackling rising seas, celebrating innovative students.
news.summary: The 2025 Future City® global STEM Competition winners were revealed by DiscoverE (Discover Engineering) in Washington on February 19. This year's competition focused on the theme "Above the Current," showcasing the talents of middle and high school students. The competition highlighted innovative solutions from students worldwide.

news.headline: Direxion launches LMBO and REKT ETFs, providing different ways to invest in blockchain. Crypto market value grew from $1.99T to $3.14T in a year. Millennials hold 17% of wealth in digital assets. 10,000+ digital coins in circulation.
news.summary: The total value of all virtual currencies in the blockchain ecosystem has increased from $1.99 trillion to $3.14 trillion in the past year, showing a 60% expansion. The number of digital coins and tokens in circulation has grown from 66 in 2013 to over 10,000 today. Wealthy millennials who identify as conservative investors are allocating an average of 17% of their portfolio to cryptocurrencies, indicating a generational shift in risk management. This demonstrates the growing integration of digital assets into mainstream society beyond blind speculation.

news.headline: Sectigo launches CaaS for partners to manage digital certificates, revolutionizes SSL/PKI resellers.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Sectigo has introduced Sectigo CaaS, a service tailored for SSL/PKI resellers, domain registrars, web hosts, and MSPs. This new solution streamlines certificate management by providing automated lifecycle management and domain validation processes through a unified API. This offering aims to help partners anticipate their customers' certificate requirements effectively. Specifically designed for industry professionals, Sectigo CaaS offers a comprehensive approach to certificate needs.

news.headline: FlowPath CMMS introduces AI Assistant for facility management to enhance efficiency with real-time insights.
news.summary: A new AI Assistant has been introduced by FlowPath in Atlanta to streamline work order processing, predictive maintenance, and asset management. This innovative tool provides real-time insights for facility teams, enhancing operational efficiency.

news.headline: Blue Door Realty Group joins Property.ca on December 4, 2024, meeting TRREB and RECO compliance, strengthening talent roster.
news.summary: Property.ca Inc. Brokerage has reached a significant milestone in its expansion by integrating Blue Door Realty Group (Blue Door) into its operations as of December 4, 2024. This successful transition ensures that Blue Door now operates under the umbrella of Property.ca, adhering to all Toronto Regional Real Estate Board (TRREB) and Real Estate Council of Ontario (RECO) compliance regulations. This move signifies a strategic advancement in Property.ca's dedication to consolidating its presence in the real estate market.

news.headline: Global Talent PR introduces new EB-1A Visa Media Services with Judging and Membership programs, enhancing their offerings.
news.summary: A renowned agency focused on exceptional ability visa applications, Global Talent PR, revealed its new Judging and Membership programs on Feb. 19, 2025. The programs aim to enhance the company's services for EB-1A and O-1 visa applicants. Based in Washington and Portland, the agency caters to individuals with remarkable talent by offering specialized assistance. This new development showcases the company's commitment to providing comprehensive support in the visa application process.

news.headline: Moso Networks introduces new 5G outdoor radio & AI platform, to showcase at MWC Barcelona. Canopy 5GOD2 launched; products & solutions integration displayed at Booth CS34.
news.summary: At MWC Barcelona, Moso will unveil its latest products and partner solutions at Booth CS34. The US-based company, Moso Networks, renowned for its private wireless technology, revealed the Moso Canopy 5GOD2, a new high-power 5G outdoor radio on Feb. 19, 2025.

news.headline: Ameresco approved for streetlight project in New Orleans, using LED lights & smart tech to enhance efficiency.
news.summary: A leading energy solutions provider, Ameresco, Inc. (NYSE: AMRC), has received approval for a streetlight technology pilot in New Orleans. The project aims to enhance the city's streetlighting infrastructure by incorporating advanced LED lights and smart city technology. This initiative is expected to improve energy efficiency and public safety in New Orleans. The pilot project is set to revolutionize the city's current system, reflecting Ameresco's commitment to assisting customers in navigating the energy transition.

news.headline: Corvias, Sunstone Energy, and City, Light & Power completed Phase III energy project at Fort Riley, supporting DOD goals.
news.summary: Located in Fort Riley, Kansas, the completion of Phase III of an energy independence and security initiative was announced by Corvias, a prominent energy and infrastructure solutions provider, in conjunction with Sunstone Energy Development and City, Light & Power. This project at the U.S. Army Garrison Fort Riley has been operational for a month, as part of efforts to bolster the U.S. Department of Defense's operational resilience and readiness objectives. With the aim of supporting the Department of Defense's goal to ensure self-sufficiency, this initiative marks a significant milestone in enhancing the energy infrastructure.

news.headline: Luca Mining Corp. named to TSXV Top 50 list of top performing companies for 2025. (Total of 50 companies included)
news.summary: Luca Mining Corp. (Luca), a company based in Vancouver, BC, shared exciting news on Feb. 19, 2025. Luca, listed as LUCA on the TSX Venture Exchange and as LUCMF on OTCQX and Frankfurt as Z68, proudly revealed its inclusion in the prestigious 2025 TSX Venture 50TM. This list recognizes the top-performing companies in the industry and serves as an annual ranking of leading entities. Luca's presence on this esteemed list signifies its outstanding performance and success in the market.

news.headline: Escalade, Inc. will announce Q4 and full year 2024 results before a conference call set for Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: In Evansville, Indiana on February 19, 2025, Escalade, Inc. disclosed that they will be releasing their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. Escalade, Inc., a prominent company in the sporting goods and recreational equipment sector, operates under the ticker symbol NASDAQ: ESCA. Stay tuned for the upcoming announcement to learn more about their performance during this period.

news.headline: Avantor to present at TD Cowen's 45th Annual Health Care Conference. President and CEO Michael Stubblefield will represent.
news.summary: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on February 19, 2025, Avantor, Inc. (NYSE: AVTR), a prominent global supplier of essential products and services to clients in life sciences and advanced technology sectors, revealed that their President and CEO, Michael Stubblefield, is scheduled to speak at TD.

news.headline: IMUNON reports higher IL-12 levels in advanced ovarian cancer patients receiving 100mg/m2 IMNN-001 dose, 20% increase vs 79mg/m2 dose.
news.summary: New data supports the dose-dependent mechanism of IMNN-001, showing that the 100mg/m2 dose leads to a 20% increase in IL-12 levels compared to the 79mg/m2 dose. This indicates that higher doses of IMNN-001 result in greater elevation of IL-12 levels.

news.headline: OrthoPediatrics Corp. will announce Q4 and FY 2024 financial results on March 4, 2025 after market close. Conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Warsaw, Indiana-based company OrthoPediatrics Corp. is set to report its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 4, 2025, after the market closes. The company, trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol KIDS, specializes in pediatric orthopedics. A conference call is scheduled to take place on the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time to delve into the details of the results.

news.headline: Vision Life Holdings introduces UTEX Eco Ink, revolutionizing textile printing with no fabric pre- and post-processing.
news.summary: A new type of textile printing ink is revolutionizing the global textile dyeing sector by enabling Direct-to-Product (DTP) printing without the need for pre- and post-processing of fabrics. This innovation significantly decreases both time and expenses involved in the process. Furthermore, it contributes to environmental sustainability by addressing ecological issues through the development of eco-friendly ink technology. UTEX Eco Ink, the pioneering product, is at the forefront of this advancement, making a profound impact on the industry.

news.headline: SpringWorks Therapeutics and Jennifer Fisher collaborate on desmoid tumor awareness campaign, aiming to educate and encourage action.
news.summary: An educational initiative has been launched to increase understanding and initiate discussions about desmoid tumors, highlighting the severe effects they have on patients. The campaign is being conducted in Stamford, Conn., starting from Feb. 19, 2025. SpringWorks Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: SWTX), a biopharmaceutical firm at the commercial stage, is leading this effort.

news.headline: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts enhances diabetes support with new care options, medication adherence pilot program.
news.summary: Today, Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts, the state's top health plan, revealed enhancements to its care options for members with diabetes alongside the launch of a pilot program aimed at enhancing medication adherence. These initiatives signify a crucial development in the healthcare sector, with a focus on addressing the needs of those with diabetes. The program is set to provide additional support and resources for affected members, underlining the company's commitment to improving health outcomes.

news.headline: Tennis participation in the U.S. hits record high with 25.7 million players in 2024, 1 in 12 Americans. Success in diverse demographics. USTA strategy effective.
news.summary: In 2024, a record-high proportion of Americans, approximately 1 in 12, participated in tennis. This increase signifies a shift in cultural trends, particularly seen in the growing participation rates among Black/African American and Hispanic individuals, as well as young adults and seniors. The success of the United States Tennis Association's strategy is evident in the expansion of tennis participation across a diverse range of demographics.

news.headline: Verkada secures $200M in funding for security solutions. General Catalyst & Eclipse lead Series E round.
news.summary: Verkada, a leading cloud-based physical security technology pioneer based in San Mateo, California, revealed on February 19, 2025, that they have secured a total of $200 million in funding through a Series E round. This funding initiative was headed by General Catalyst, with major contributions from Eclipse and also saw participation from several new investors.

news.headline: 2030: Warehouse Management System revenues hit US$10 billion with increasing investment in software and private wireless networks.
news.summary: Investment in advanced technology deployments focusing on software and private wireless networks is projected to increase in the coming years. By 2025, there will be a significant rise in investments targeted towards enhancing warehouse operations through new and existing software packages. This growth is expected to be prominent on a global scale.

news.headline: Configit introduces Value-Added Reseller program for mid-market, enhancing tailored solutions, global leader in CLM.
news.summary: In Copenhagen, Denmark, on February 19, 2025, Configit, a prominent player in Configuration Lifecycle Management (CLM) sector, revealed its latest Value-Added Reseller (VAR) initiative. The implementation of this program aims to bolster Configit's capacity to provide customized solutions, further solidifying its position as a frontrunner in the industry.

news.headline: TalentLMS provides learning software for women-owned SMBs on International Women's Day, aiming to #AccelerateAction.
news.summary: This year, International Women's Day focuses on #AccelerateAction. TalentLMS has introduced its Skills Accelerator Program in support, aiming to assist female entrepreneurs by providing upskilling opportunities and fostering a culture of continual learning. Based in San Francisco, the program was launched on Feb. 19, 2025. TalentLMS, renowned as a top LMS for enhancing learning outcomes, has taken a significant step forward in this initiative.

news.headline: Nimbello doubled its SyteLine customer base in 2024 and expects continued growth in 2025.
news.summary: In South Bend, Indiana on February 19, 2025, Nimbello, a primary supplier of Accounts Payable (AP) automation solutions tailored for Infor SyteLine ERP users, revealed that its SyteLine customer count surged twofold in 2024. The company anticipates sustaining this momentum and replicating the growth in 2025. This accelerated expansion showcases the firm's significant progress in the market sector.

news.headline: Hospitals focus on improving surgical services efficiency due to financial pressure. - Chicago, Feb 19, 2025.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Chicago, it was reported that hospitals and health systems are facing growing financial and operational challenges. Enhancing efficiency in surgical services has emerged as a critical focus in light of these pressures. Surgical Directions, a leading provider in perioperative and procedural care, is at the forefront of addressing this issue.

news.headline: Chipotle plans to hire 20,000 new employees for "Burrito Season." Crew members can advance to Restaurateur in 3.5 years.
news.summary: Popular fast-casual restaurant chain Chipotle plans to recruit 20,000 new employees for its upcoming peak period known as "Burrito Season" occurring between March and May. Chipotle offers exciting advancement opportunities, with crew members potentially reaching the rank of Restaurateur in just three and a half years. This position comes with attractive compensation.

news.headline: Michael Saylor's company, Strategy, plans to raise $2 billion through private offering to buy more Bitcoin. Offering includes a $300 million option for early buyers. Notes will mature on March 1, 2030, convertible into cash, stock, or a mix. The principal amount will stay constant. Redemption for cash possible starting March 5, 2027, if stock price remains 130% above conversion price.
news.summary: Correction: The article has been updated to rectify details regarding the “21/21 Plan” in the sixth paragraph.Michael Saylor's Strategy, the leading corporate holder of Bitcoin globally, plans to raise $2 billion through a private offering of convertible debt to acquire more Bitcoin. The announcement made on Tuesday includes a provision for an extra $300 million for early investors. The notes, maturing on March 1, 2030, can be converted into cash, stock, or a blend of both according to Strategy's choice.These notes will not attract regular interest or appreciate in value, maintaining a constant principal amount. Strategy has the option to redeem the notes for cash starting March 5, 2027, provided its stock price remains at least 130% above the conversion price.

news.headline: Land & Buildings nominates Jim Hoffmann and Adam Troso as independent candidates for National Health Investors board.
news.summary: A shareholder of National Health Investors, Inc. (NYSE: NHI), Land & Buildings Investment Management, LLC, has put forward two independent candidates for election to the NHI Board of Directors at the 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. The nominees are highly qualified.

news.headline: Momnt teams up with ChargeAfter to offer contractors more financing options, expanding loan products for customers.
news.summary: Atlanta-based fintech company, Momnt, known for real-time lending and payment solutions, has joined forces with ChargeAfter, an embedded lending platform for point-of-sale financing. The collaboration aims to offer home improvement contractors a wider array of competitive lending choices for their customers. Through this partnership, contractors on the ChargeAfter platform can now access Momnt's diverse loan products to provide to their clients. This move is expected to result in increased approval rates and a better customer experience for contractors and customers alike.

news.headline: IQHQ signs 225,000 SF lease with Chan Zuckerberg Initiative for Elco Yards in Redwood City. New science work partnership.
news.summary: In San Francisco, IQHQ, Inc., a top developer of life science districts, revealed a significant development. The company secured a lease for 225,000 square feet with the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative (CZI) at IQHQ's Elco Yards district in Redwood City, California. CZI will be occupying an entire building out of the four available at Elco Yards for its upcoming scientific endeavors. This partnership marks an exciting collaboration for IQHQ, showcasing its commitment to fostering innovation in the life sciences sector.

news.headline: DaVinci® Roofscapes introduces 2 new Single-Width Slate colors - Rock Ridge & Aurora, expanding their offerings.
news.summary: Westlake Royal Building Products, a subsidiary of Westlake (NYSE:WLK), has introduced two new colors, Rock Ridge and Aurora, under the DaVinci Roofscapes brand. These additions, part of the Nature Crafted Collection, enhance the Single-Width Slate profile range and provide homeowners with the aesthetics of genuine slate hues along with the longevity of DaVinci’s premium materials. The new colors have been launched to expand the product offerings and offer consumers more options.

news.headline: Fresh Del Monte wins 2025 SEAL Business Sustainability Award for fourth time, recognized for 27.5% reduction target.
news.summary: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc., a prominent player in the global fresh and fresh-cut fruit and vegetable market, received a 2025 SEAL Business Sustainability Award in the Environmental Initiative sector. The award acknowledges companies exhibiting excellence, creativity, and dedication to sustainable practices. Fresh Del Monte was honored for meeting its goal of reducing by 27.5%. This achievement demonstrates the company's commitment to environmental responsibility and sustainability.

news.headline: Sparkfly expands to 18,000 locations, posts 30% growth in 2024. Revenue up by 30%, 98.6% client retention rate.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Sparkfly, a renowned retail technology solutions firm, revealed impressive accomplishments for 2024. They experienced a noteworthy 30% revenue surge compared to the previous year. Remarkably, they sustained an outstanding 98.6% client retention rate alongside a remarkable 99.4% revenue retention rate. The surge in revenue and client retention underscores the escalating consumer desire for enhanced value in retail, QSR, and food service sectors.

news.headline: Soccer Post management, led by CEO Blake Sonnek-Schmelz, acquires majority stake from TZP Group with backing from York Capital Management. Transaction terms undisclosed. Founded in 1979 in Eatontown, New Jersey.
news.summary: In New York, Soccer Post management, under CEO Blake Sonnek-Schmelz, revealed the purchase of a majority stake in the Company from TZP Group. The acquisition was supported financially by York Capital Management’s private equity branch and soccer-focused strategic investors. Founded in 1979 and based in Eatontown, New Jersey, Soccer Post's financial details in the deal were not disclosed.

news.headline: Aramark won 2025 Ed Tech Product Award for AIWX Connect platform in Large Company Campus Equipment and Technology category.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, Aramark, a prominent facilities management provider operating in various sectors like education, healthcare, business, sports, leisure, and corrections, was recently announced as the winner of the 2025 Ed Tech Product Awards in the Large Company Campus Equipment and Technology division. This recognition specifically acknowledges their AIWX Connect technology platform, which leverages IoT technology for building and occupant identification. Aramark, listed as NYSE:ARMK, stands out as a global leader in facilities management, offering innovative solutions across a range of industries.

news.headline: Lantern Pharma files PCT patent app for machine learning model predicting BBB permeability of drug-candidates.
news.summary: In Dallas, Lantern Pharma Inc. (NASDAQ: LTRN) disclosed the release of their PCT patent application (PCT/US2024/019851), showcasing an innovative machine learning advancement for forecasting blood-brain barrier (BBB) permeability. This AI company focuses on cancer treatment advancements, aiming to revolutionize the efficiency and speed of oncology drug research. The application garnered a positive PCT search report, highlighting no substantial prior concerns.

news.headline: RingCentral and BT launch Cloud Work RingCX, AI-powered platform for contact centers, aiming to transform businesses globally.
news.summary: In Belmont, California, RingCentral, Inc. and BT have collaborated to launch Cloud Work RingCX™, utilizing AI technology, for effective business communications. RingCentral, a prominent firm in this sector listed on NYSE as RNG, has teamed up with BT, a leading UK provider connecting over a million business and public sector clients. The newly introduced Cloud Work RingCX is a cloud-based contact center solution enhanced with AI features. It aims to provide seamless user experience and quick deployment for enterprises and public sector entities of varying sizes.

news.headline: 4DMT to join investor conferences in March, highlighting genetic medicine potential. Management to host fireside chats and one-on-one meetings.
news.summary: 4D Molecular Therapeutics, based in Emeryville, California, disclosed on Feb. 19, 2025, that they will be participating in fireside chats at investor conferences in March. The company, trading under Nasdaq symbols FDMT and 4DMT, aims to maximize genetic medicines' efficacy in treating prevalent diseases. This initiative involves members of the management team engaging in discussions and one-on-one meetings with investors during the conferences.

news.headline: Ontrak Health and Sentara Health Plans extend contract for three years in Virginia, through 2027. (Including relevant company names)
news.summary: In Miami, Ontrak, Inc. (NASDAQ: OTRK), a prominent behavioral healthcare company utilizing AI and telehealth, has revealed a contract extension with Sentara Health Plans in Virginia. The extension spans three years, prolonging the partnership through December 2027. Sentara Health Plans, part of Sentara Health, a non-profit healthcare system, has collaborated with Ontrak successfully in the past, with three previous expansions.

news.headline: Ardelyx to present at TD Cowen's 45th Annual Health Care Conference on March 3, 2025 at 9:50am ET in Boston. (Numbers: Nasdaq: ARDX, founded in Waltham, Mass., on Feb 19, 2025)
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Waltham-based Ardelyx, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARDX) revealed that it will participate in TD Cowen’s 45th Annual Health Care Conference on March 3, 2025, at 9:50am ET in Boston. Ardelyx, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering, developing, and commercializing groundbreaking medicines that address critical unmet medical needs. The management will be presenting at the event, marking a significant step for the company in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Research by Diversified shows companies not investing enough in workforce technologies like videoconferencing & collaboration tools. 89% of workers use personal devices for work.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, recent research conducted by Diversified, a prominent global technology solutions provider, suggests that businesses are not allocating sufficient resources towards workforce technologies such as videoconferencing tools, collaboration platforms, and advanced production and broadcast solutions. This lack of investment poses potential threats to both productivity and employee well-being. The findings of the Diversified Technology Maturity Survey, which surveyed over 1,600 U.S. employees, indicate that 89% of workers resort to using their personal devices or applications for work tasks, primarily due to the perceived ease of use.

news.headline: Oxford Lane Capital Corp. plans public offering of notes, terms TBD, includes 30-day option for more.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Greenwich-based company Oxford Lane Capital Corp. (NasdaqGS: OXLC) disclosed the initiation of a registered public offering for notes. The offering price and specifics of the notes will be established through discussions between the Company and the underwriters. Additionally, Oxford Lane Capital Corp. intends to provide the underwriters with a 30-day option for acquiring extra notes under the same conditions to address potential over-allotments.

news.headline: Viant to discuss at investor conference soon, focusing on company performance and future plans.
news.summary: On Wednesday, it was reported that the global death toll from the ongoing pandemic has surpassed 5 million, with the United States still leading in the number of total deaths at over 750,000. Countries like Brazil, India, and Mexico have also been heavily impacted by the virus, each reporting over 200,000 deaths. The World Health Organization has continued to emphasize the importance of vaccination and public health measures to combat the spread of the virus and prevent further loss of life. The rising death toll serves as a stark reminder of the devastating impact of the pandemic worldwide.

news.headline: Menlo Security acquires Votiro, enhancing data security with AI-driven platform; aims for seamless implementation in enterprises.
news.summary: A company based in Mountain View, California, Menlo Security, a leading provider of Secure Enterprise Browsers, has recently acquired Votiro. Votiro is known for its expertise in advanced Content Disarm & Reconstruction (CDR) and data loss prevention. This acquisition aims to combine the strengths of both companies to help enterprises efficiently implement data security measures while maintaining high levels of productivity. The collaboration between Menlo Security and Votiro is expected to enhance data protection in modern enterprises where data is crucial.

news.headline: Eikon Therapeutics introduces new Oblique Line Scan tech & Single Molecule Tracking platform in Nature Methods.
news.summary: Eikon Therapeutics, Inc., a biotech company based in Hayward, California, has unveiled their latest development in advanced technology. Their Oblique Line Scan (OLS) technology, which has been featured in a publication by Nature Methods, can now be integrated with Eikon's Single Molecule Tracking (SMT) platform. This combination allows for the swift analysis of new drug targets, significantly speeding up the drug discovery process. Eikon Therapeutics specializes in merging engineering techniques with molecular and cell biology to drive innovation in drug discovery. This new advancement showcases their commitment to pushing the boundaries of biotechnology.

news.headline: Mundial Media hires four key leaders after funding round, targeting growth in multicultural advertising. CEO welcomes move.
news.summary: A popular contextual marketing platform focused on multicultural audiences, Mundial Media, based in Los Angeles, revealed the incorporation of four new executives into its top management team. This move comes on the heels of a prosperous funding round and showcases the firm's dedication to pioneering strategies and expansion in multicultural advertising. CEO Tony Gonzalez expressed enthusiasm for the notable additions to the leadership, signaling a step towards continued innovation and growth in the company.

news.headline: Augury secures $75M funding, maintains $1B+ valuation, aims to accelerate industrial AI solutions for manufacturers.Character count: 111
news.summary: Augury Inc., a leading provider of Industrial AI solutions for Reliability and Process Optimization, announced important initiatives in New York. They aim to boost innovation in their portfolio for the largest manufacturers, enhancing partnerships with key industry players. Augury plans to offer improved AI solutions with enhanced accuracy and reliability for manufacturing processes.
